subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1920-01-04
subcodes.first_line: Haifa will develop to such a degree that this mountain will be covered entirely in light. From here to 'Akka will be connected by roads and on each side trees will be planted
subcodes.first_line_orig: حیفا بدرجه ای ترقی کند که این کوه یکپارچه نور شود از اینجا تا عکا
subcodes.subjects: @future of Haifa; of the Holy Land, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @charitable associations; humanitarian activities, @status of kings; future of monarchy
